expectations.text: behavioral_check: Restricts ONLY `ElectrodeGroup` by `nwb_file_name` (which it has as a PK field) — does NOT restrict `Probe` by `nwb_file_name` (Probe is keyed by `probe_id` and has no session FK; the restriction would silently no-op)
expectations.evidence: Query is `(ElectrodeGroup & {"nwb_file_name": ...}) * Electrode * Probe`; Probe is never restricted by nwb_file_name.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Joins on the shared `probe_id` column (ElectrodeGroup's nullable FK to Probe) to surface `probe_type` / Probe-side fields
expectations.evidence: Joins via Electrode * Probe to surface probe_id and probe_type/probe_model — uses probe_id as the linking attr.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Mentions that `-> [nullable] Probe` means some electrode groups may have NULL `probe_id` and won't survive the inner join — handle via projection or a separate restriction if those rows matter
expectations.evidence: No mention of nullable probe_id or that null-FK groups would drop out of the inner join.
